name: Colt Resources Inc.
summary: Colt Resources Inc., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada and Portugal. It primarily explores for gold, tungsten, copper, and zinc deposits. The company primarily holds 100% interest in the Boa F√É¬© project covering an area of 46.78 square kilometers located in the Alentejo region of southern Portugal; and Tabua√É¬ßo tungsten project, which covers an area of 45.128 square kilometers in north central Portugal. Colt Resources Inc. was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.
